/usr/bin/clang++-18 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/UCalc.dir/UCalc_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UCalc.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UCalc.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UCalc.dir/TPNumber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UCalc.dir/TFrac.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UCalc.dir/TComplex.cpp.o -o UCalc  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
